info.name: Cogni-Advisor API Test Collection
info.description: Comprehensive test collection for all API endpoints in the Cogni-Advisor project. Each endpoint includes multiple scenarios: Success, Missing Auth, Wrong Role, Validation Error, Not Found, and Duplicate/Conflict where applicable.

variables.notes: 1) Start the server: npm run dev  2) Login as each role using POST /api/auth/login  3) Copy the token into the variables above  4) Replace placeholder IDs (e.g. STUDENT_ID, COURSE_ID, USER_ID) with real values from your database

howToUse.step1: Run the server: npm run dev
howToUse.step2: Login with each role using the auth.login endpoint and copy the returned token into the variables above
howToUse.step3: Replace placeholder values like {{STUDENT_ID}}, {{COURSE_ID}}, {{PLAN_ID}}, etc. with real IDs from your database
howToUse.step4: Send each request using your preferred HTTP client (curl, Postman, Insomnia, Bruno, etc.)
howToUse.step5: Compare the actual response status and body against the expectedStatus and expectedBody described in each scenario

scenarios.name: Error - Database disconnected
scenarios.note: This scenario occurs when the database is unavailable

modules.description: Authentication endpoints - login and password change

scenarios.name: Validation Error - identifier too short (less than 14 chars)
Validation Error - password too short (less than 6 chars)
Rate Limit - more than 10 requests in 15 minutes
scenarios.note: Send this request 11+ times rapidly to trigger rate limiting

expectedBody.message: Too many login attempts, please try again later.

scenarios.name: Success - Valid current and new password
Success - User deleted (204 No Content)
scenarios.note: Use a USER_ID that is not the current admin (cannot delete self)

scenarios.name: Fail - Cannot delete own account
scenarios.note: When USER_ID equals the logged-in admin's id

scenarios.name: Fail - ADMIN cannot access STUDENT endpoint
Success - Get current student profile
scenarios.expectedBody: <student profile with user and academic info>

scenarios.name: Success - ADMIN gets student by ID
Validation Error - credits must be at least 1
Success - Update course name and credits
Success - Toggle availability (true -> false or vice versa)
Success - Get course with prerequisite list
Success - Add CS101 as prerequisite for CS201
Fail - Course or prerequisite not found
Success - Student enrolls in available course
Fail - Student already enrolled in this course
Fail - Prerequisites not met
scenarios.note: Use a course_id that has prerequisites the student has not completed

scenarios.name: Success - Mark course as passed with grade A
Success - Mark course as failed with grade F
Success - Advisor assigns grade B to student
Fail - Student or course not found
Validation Error - grade not in A/B/C/D/F
Success - Create semester with name and dates
Success - Create semester with name only
Success - Create record with GPA and hours
Success - Create record with required fields only
Validation Error - missing student_id or semester_id
Success - Get all semester records for a student
Success - No records found (returns empty array)
Success - Get all records for a semester
Success - Advisor creates feedback for student

body.message: Great progress this semester. Keep it up!

scenarios.name: Success - Feedback without message (message is optional)
Success - Advisor gets feedback for student
Success - Advisor gets their own feedback list
Fail - STUDENT cannot access advisor feedback
Success - Get all notifications for current user

body.title: System Update
body.body: The system will be under maintenance tonight.

scenarios.name: Success - Notification with only recipient_id (title and body are optional)
Success - All notifications marked as read
Success - Mark specific notification as read
Fail - Plan already exists for this semester

expectedBody.message: You already created a plan for this semester

scenarios.name: Validation Error - semester_id must be a number, not string
Fail - ADVISOR cannot create student plan
Success - Get current plan with course details
Success - Get plan for specific semester by query param
Fail - No plan found for current semester
scenarios.note: Use a student who has no plan created yet

expectedBody.message: No study plan found for the current semester

scenarios.name: Validation Error - semesterId query param is not a number
Success - Add course to PENDING plan
Fail - Plan is APPROVED or REJECTED (locked)
scenarios.note: First get the plan reviewed and approved, then try to add a course

scenarios.name: Fail - Student does not own this plan
scenarios.note: Use a plan_id that belongs to a different student

scenarios.name: Success - Submit PENDING plan for advisor review
Fail - Plan already submitted
scenarios.note: Submitting a plan that is already APPROVED or REJECTED

scenarios.name: Success - Advisor rejects plan with feedback

body.feedback: You have not met the prerequisites for CS301. Please revise your plan.

scenarios.name: Success - Advisor gets all pending plans
scenarios.expectedBody: <array of pending study plans with student and course details>

scenarios.name: Fail - STUDENT cannot access pending plans
Success - Generate recommended courses based on completed prerequisites
Fail - ADVISOR cannot generate student plan
Success - Get recommendations (all / default semester)
scenarios.expectedBody: <array of recommended courses with credits and prerequisites>

scenarios.name: Success - Get recommendations for specific semester
